meta.nazev: 2×2 mřížka čtverců — doplň posun na další řadu

cms.task_text: Kód kreslí čtverce v řadě, ale [hlp]chybí přesun na druhou řadu[/hlp]. Doplňte bloky pro posun dolů a zpět.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">2</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="controls_repeat_ext"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">2</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="controls_repeat_ext"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="ro" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">2</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="rc"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">2</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="ri"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="pu1"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="pd1"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="pu2"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="bk1"><field name="DISTANCE">160</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg2"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="lt1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="pd2"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
